arts.ttl: PSG crowned Ligue 1 champions with six games to spare as Luis Enrique's men chase Invincibles season
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain win their fourth successive Ligue 1 title with six games to spare thanks to a 1-0 victory over Angers at the Parc des Princes.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Are Looking to Win Transfer Race £60M-Rated Barcelona, PSG Target for One Major Reason
arts.sum: Last summer, Paris Saint-Germain expressed interest in signing Atalanta forward Ademola Lookman, but a deal never materialized. However, recent reports indicate that PSG is still keen on bringing the Nigerian forward to the French capital. Matteo Moretto and Fabrizio Romano, via Viva El Fútbol, report that PSG’s interest remains strong as Lookman evaluates his options […] The post Man Utd Are Looking to Win Transfer Race £60M-Rated Barcelona, PSG Target for One Major Reason appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Unwilling to Listen to Liverpool Star’s Representative Amid Barcelona, PSG Links
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have focused on bringing in young, emerging talent in recent transfer windows. However, Luis Enrique and Luis Campos understand that experience is equally important—provided it fits within the club’s culture and playing style. One area they may look to strengthen is defense, particularly with Milan Skriniar expected to leave permanently this summer after […] The post Real Madrid Unwilling to Listen to Liverpool Star’s Representative Amid Barcelona, PSG Links appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Emerge as Top Contender to Beat PSG, Barcelona for Newcastle Transfer Target
arts.sum: With Randal Kolo Muani now at Juventus, Paris Saint-Germain are probably looking to offload the French striker permanently, either to the Turin club or another potential suitor. This could prompt the Ligue 1 side to seek a new No. 9 this summer. arts.ttl: PSG boss challenges his unbeaten side to become the first French Invincibles
arts.sum: Luis Enrique's team can seal a fourth consecutive Ligue 1 title on Saturday before their huge showdown with Aston Villa in the Champions League quarter-finals later this month
